resources.string: Explore recent earthquake activity with an accessible multi-touch map.
Interactive earthquake map. Pinch with two fingers to zoom, drag to pan, and tap a marker to view details.
Tap an earthquake marker or list item to view details.
Magnitude %1$.1f earthquake near %2$s. Tap to view details.
Showing live USGS earthquake data from the past day.
Showing built-in sample data until live data loads.
Could not load live data. Showing sample data instead.
No earthquake events were found in the live feed.
No earthquake events are loaded yet.

Total loaded: %1$d
Currently visible: %2$d
Strongest: M%3$.1f near %4$s
Average depth: %5$.1f km
Total loaded: %1$d\nCurrently visible: 0\nNo earthquakes match the current filter.
